sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5136" key="a)melhtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμελ-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n5136.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carelessly written,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἦτα,</foreign> of a musical note, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2135.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alyp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>,al., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2137.tlg001:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gaud.Harm.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
